title: psychotria glandulosa
intro: Psychotria glandulosa, also known as the glandular wild coffee or mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a native plant to the tropical forests of Central and South America, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, providing health benefits such as improved respiratory function and protection against infections. The leaves of the Psychotria glandulosa plant can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
